s: In 2007, Jonathan Albaladejo suited up for WSN as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 1.880, WHIP 0.630, SO 12, WAR 0.300.
Changed teams after the previous season (WSN -> NYY).
In 2008, Jonathan Albaladejo suited up for NYY as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.950, WHIP 1.540, SO 13, WAR 0.100. Notable context: Joined NYY.
In 2009, Jonathan Albaladejo suited up for NYY as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.240, WHIP 1.660, SO 21, WAR -0.300.
In 2010, Jonathan Albaladejo suited up for NYY as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.970, WHIP 1.500, SO 8, WAR -0.100.
Changed teams after the previous season (NYY -> ARI).
In 2012, Jonathan Albaladejo suited up for ARI as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 9.000, WHIP 1.670, SO 2, WAR -0.100. Notable context: Joined ARI.
